narrative:
Delta Three (precinct in Fulton County) has 896 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.3%, a clear Republican lean of 10.6 percentage points.
